generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO strategic planner, I've seen firsthand how vital our alliances are for national security. The current administration's commitment to burden-sharing ensures we're not left vulnerable. Don't believe the fear-mongering about 'freeloaders' - our partners contribute in ways that matter. #StrongAlliances #NationalSecurityFirst
